summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InsureHub SMTP email functionality and user registration features. All core email features are working correctly including Gmail SMTP configuration, welcome emails, notification emails, and custom email sending.
passed_tests: User registration sends welcome email to new user
User registration sends notification email to existing HR/Admin users
Registration form includes phone number field with proper data-testid
Login page and registration form are accessible
All UI elements are clickable and functional
No error messages found in UI
